Nice protective case but not sure why they can't make it one piece like the 2nd gen Airpod cases. I've seen lots of reviews for others that says top will not stay on because of two piece design.
Now I purchased two, which I usually do with an item like this. One for backup since these kinds of items tend to wear fast. Both were shipped on different dates and the first one was delivered to wrong address. Amazon shipping has really gone downhills. They need to address this issue...Fast!

reviews.title: Does the job, looks cute
reviews.text: It definitely looks like the picture. The rubber is flimsy, and difficult to attach to the headphone case. It took me two tries to get it to fit the bottom appropriately, because the first time it slipped and I couldn't fit the charging cord through the back. But others might be better at this. The keychain is pretty. The clip to attach it is smaller than I anticipated and almost didn't fit my purse. It will protect the case from scratches, but that's hardly why I bought it- it's sparkly and pretty and does the job well enough.

reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

reviews.title: Turns off when I use the Aux
reviews.text: These don’t connect to a number of my Bluetooth devices. Basically only phones and tablets work with them. So I tried to use the AUX cord, and as soon as you turn it on with the aux cord in or plug it in when they’re already on, they shut off. Even in the directions it says they shut off….then why add it??? Even after they shut off, I tried to see if they worked anyway since the directions say that. They don’t. If they only connect to phones & tablets through Bluetooth only, it needs to say that.

reviews.title: Works with iPhone 13
reviews.text:
This appears to use analog out over Lighting rather than having a DAC in the cable. Evidence is that there is volume control similar to using headphones rather than the no volume when plugged into an audio interface. Also if you touch the connector while plugged into speakers you get the sort of popping and cracking found when messing with a headphone cable.

So in summary, it just works.

reviews.title: The hook doesn't remain closed
reviews.text: The hook doesn't remain closed... reordered new one same issue ..just returning item in total ..

reviews.title: Almost lost my AirPods because of this case.
reviews.text:
Had my AirPods attached to my phone case until it wasn’t.
On the first day I tried this case out on my phone, I almost lost my AirPods. I was Christmas shopping and had my phone in my back pocket the entire time. When I got home I noticed my AirPods wasn’t attached to my phone. So, I hopelessly went back to the first store I was at and there they were, on the parking lot floor! Thankfully no one had seen them! So no thanks to this case I have my AirPods.

reviews.title: All it needs is a hole for a clip and it would be perfect
reviews.text: I just like to attach my airpod covers to the case so it makes it inflexible when it doesn't offer a hole on the side to put a clip or keychain thru. Super cute tho!

title: elago Silicone Protective Case Compatible with Apple AirPods 2 Wireless Charging Case, Front LED Visible, Anti-Slip Coating Inside [Patent Registered] [Medium Grey]
features: 【FRONT LED VISIBLE】 You see the LED light through a very thin silicone wall that is 0.3mm thin. This thin and see-through wall for the LED prevents dust and liquid from entering the case. It is twice as large as the LED indicator size, so you don't have any hassle in aligning the case with the LED Light.

【UPGRADED VERSION】 Around the LED indicator, the circle is grooved around the edges. This is for users to check the LED indicator from every angle. Thanks to this large circle, you don’t have to move to see if the LED is on.
【FITS PERFECTLY】 Anti-slip coating inside the silicone cap ensures your AirPods to stay in place. Please push down completely and adjust the case to make it fit perfectly.

【PREMIUM SILICONE】 The case is made from flexible, shock-resistant silicone material to protect your Airpods case from scratches and external impacts. Durable silicone material provides a nice grip to prevent slippage.
【WARRANTY】 Purchase with confidence! 30-days 100% Money Back Guarantee & 1-year replacement warranty. - AirPods and AirPods Charging Case are not included.

reviews.title: So far! Its great
reviews.text: Cover fit nice and snug. Easy to install. So far its been great! Good product. Does what it says

reviews.title: Cute and durable
reviews.text: This case does it's intended job of protecting my Airpods from drops and dings. The lavender is nice and subtle. The case is a good quality case, easy to put on, and stays in place.

reviews.title: Even more in love with Elago products now
reviews.text:
OMG! The finish on this case is so soft I can't stop touching it! ... Good touch, not bad touch.
I've been super impressed with everything I've bought from Elago since I discovered them and they are my go-to brand for phone cases. I saw this Airpod case listed for a very reasonable price and being Elago I didn't really think twice when selecting it. I was not disappointed!
Great fit and manufacture. And the finish on the silicone is easily the softest and most even I've even seen/felt. It's so soft. I find myself mindlessly picking it up while sitting at my computer and running my fingers over the surface turning it in my hand because it feels so nice. Elago knocked it out of the park again.

reviews.title: Love the color and feel of the case
reviews.text: The case has a nice matte and rubbery feel to it. I was dropping my airpods constantly before I had this case (as I have butterfingers) and this case has helped reduce that drastically. I also like that I don't have to take the case off the lid before I open the airpod itself. (You gotta watch out for those as they can be very annoying to do every time you want to open your airpods). I posted a picture of my case and put my white airpod on top so you can have a better comparison of what the color looks like.

reviews.title: Good Quality for the Price
reviews.text:
The sound quality on these headphones is surprisingly good for the price. You can hear sound details you might miss in a cheaper set. The playtime is impressive. The ear cuffs are comfortable even if you have sensitive ears. The overall design is sleek and modern. This is a great buy!

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided makes your decision a little easier.

title: IEM Earbuds, KZ ZS10 HiFi In-Ear Headphones In Ear Monitors Earphones with Five Drivers without Microphone (Blue)
features: Consumer Alert: Most users do not need a license to operate this wireless microphone system. Nevertheless, operating this microphone system without a license is subject to certain restrictions: the system may not cause harmful interference; it must operate at a low power level (not in excess of 50 milliwatts); and it has no protection from interference received from any other device.

title: Dekoni Audio Mercury Bulletz Moldable Memory Foam Isolation Earphone Tips, Black, 4.9mm (Single Pair - Large)

Always the best fit with memory foam technology that conforms to the shape of your ear for a comfortable, solid seal

reviews.title: Comfort and Ease of Use
reviews.text: These may be the perfect tips for IEMs. I like these way more than the silicone tips. They are easy to put in and don't bother my ears. I haven't had them long so I can't speak to their durability yet. I'll come back to this review later if I have any issues.

reviews.title: Big improvement over OEM.
reviews.text: I purchased these memory foam tips to use in place of the OEM tips on my KS Z10 Pro IEMs. The seal is drastically better as these cut out almost all external sound and let you focus purely on your music. Excellent purchase.

title: Billboard Bluetooth Wireless Folding Headphones With Enhanced Bass, Controls, and Microphone - Black
description: These Bluetooth enabled wireless headphones syncs easily and quickly to your smartphone or tablet. A charging cable is included for fast charging. The convenient wireless feature allows you to move freely without being restricted by wires. Listen to music from any room up to 33 feet away. These headphones fold in for easy storage and travel.
features: The convenient wireless feature allows you to move from room to room without carrying your device with you while still being able to hear your music, with a range of up to 33 feet away. A 3.5mm audio cable is included with this item when you want to listen to music but don't want to use the Bluetooth function. Is ideal for outdoor use such as running as exercising.
These earbuds have a charging time of 2.5 hours and provide up to 6 hours of music and talk time. Easily answer and end calls thanks to the built in mic and controls.
Never miss a call because you can't hear over the music. Thanks to the built in mic, you can answer and end calls right from the headphones.

The headphones can be folded up when not in use which makes them ideal for storage or for travel when every bit of extra space counts. This feature also prevents the headphones from accidentally getting damaged in your bag.
